CustomField.description: For partial month utilization, the Flight Hours (FH) and Cycles on the matrix should be adjusted proportionally based on the number of days in the month. For example, if the FH matrix for 50 is $0, then for a partial month (e.g., utilization filed for 15 days in July), the FH on the matrix should be calculated as (50 * (15/31)=24.19) [using the actual number of days] or (50 * (15/30) = 25 ) [using the 30/360 method]. The MR calculation will be based on the Prorated FH/FC for the partial periods utilizations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For partial month utilization, the Flight Hours (FH) and Cycles on the matrix should be adjusted proportionally based on the number of days in the month. For example, if the FH matrix for 50 is $0, then for a partial month (e.g., utilization filed for 15 days in July), the FH on the matrix should be calculated as (50 * (15/31)=24.19) [using the actual number of days] or (50 * (15/30) = 25 ) [using the 30/360 method]. Note: This field does not apply to the FH:FC Ratio Rate basis.
CustomField.label: Pro-rata No. of Days
